chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to sama'ah Ibn Mihran

text: و ما كان فيه عن سماعة بن مهران فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ ابن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن عثمان بن عيسى العامريّ، عن سماعة بن مهران‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Sama'ah ibn Mihran has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Uthman ibn Isa Al-Amiri, from Sama'ah ibn Mihran.
